summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Auth/Login/Signup flows and Stripe billing integration. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend UI tests passed (100%). Login/Signup flows work flawlessly, protected routes properly redirect to login, Pricing page displays all 4 plans, and Stripe checkout integration is fully functional with real Stripe checkout page.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.js has proper safeParseJSON helper to handle empty responses
Login.jsx and Signup.jsx have proper loading states and error handling with data-testid attributes
Checkout.jsx properly checks authLoading before redirect check (race condition fixed)
Pricing.jsx displays all 4 plans with correct pricing and features
billing.py creates real Stripe checkout sessions with proper metadata
Protected routes properly redirect to login when not authenticated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth and billing flows fully functional. Stripe integration is REAL (not mocked) using test keys. All protected routes redirect to login. Dashboard shows credits properly.

backend_api_tests.test_health_endpoint: PASS - API healthy with 54 engines operational
backend_api_tests.test_login_with_valid_credentials: PASS - Returns token and user data
backend_api_tests.test_signup_new_user: PASS - Creates user with Free plan and 20 starter credits
backend_api_tests.test_get_me_with_token: PASS - Returns user profile with credits
backend_api_tests.test_get_billing_plans: PASS - Returns all 4 plans (free, creator, pro, elite)
backend_api_tests.test_create_subscription_checkout: PASS - Returns checkout_url starting with https://checkout.stripe.com

frontend_ui_tests.login_page_loads: PASS - All form elements present with data-testid
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_shows_credits: PASS - Shows 1110 total credits, Elite plan
frontend_ui_tests.signup_creates_new_user: PASS - New user gets Free plan with 20 credits
frontend_ui_tests.pricing_page_shows_4_plans: PASS - Free, Creator, Pro, Elite all visible
frontend_ui_tests.checkout_step1_plan_selection: PASS - Shows Creator, Pro, Elite options
frontend_ui_tests.protected_routes_redirect: PASS - Dashboard, Checkout, Settings all redirect to login

mocked_status.note: Stripe integration is REAL using test keys (sk_test_emergent). Creates actual Stripe checkout sessions.
